plugins.name: english-coach
plugins.description: Reviews the English in every prompt — itemized corrections, a native rewrite, compliments for clean prose, plus a running mistake log with a stats command.

plugins.name: statusline
plugins.description: A polished Claude Code statusline with context-window and 5h rate-limit bars, git/model/effort segments and Nerd Font icons. Installs via /statusline-setup.
